title: Idiot's Array (disambiguation)
content:
The phrase '''Idiot's Array''' could mean several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Idiot's Array]]''', a winning [[sabacc]] hand

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*'''[[Idiot's Array/Legends|Idiot's Array]]''', a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] hand.
*'''''[[Another Idiot's Array 2]]''''', a [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilm]] denounced by critics due to its poor quality.
*'''''[[Idiot's Array (starship)|Idiot's Array]]''''', a [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] owned by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] chief and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]], [[Talon Karrde]].
*'''[[Idiot's Array sniper rifle]]'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Empire: Idiot's Array]]''''', a 2-issue story arc of ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' published by [[Dark Horse Comics]].
*'''''[[Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array]]''''', a Hyperspace-exclusive short story by [[Rich Handley]].
*"[[Idiot's Array (episode)|'''Idiot's Array''']]", an episode of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''
**"[[Idiot's Array (German audio drama)|'''Idiot's Array''']]", a German audio adaption of the episode.

{{Interlang
|de=Idiot's Array
|es=Despliegue del Idiota (desambiguación)
}}
